summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dead Signal Game Master features. All 39 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend fully operational with all 7 main tabs and 7 GM sub-tabs working correctly. Fixed 3 bugs: route ordering for /players/banned and /players/watchlist, and missing user variable in delete_trigger.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/gm/stats - returns all 6 stat fields (active_tasks, tracked_players, banned_players, active_triggers, broadcasts_24h, actions_24h)
Backend: GET /api/gm/stats - requires admin (403 for non-admin)
Backend: GET /api/gm/tasks - lists scheduled tasks
Backend: POST /api/gm/tasks - creates restart task
Backend: POST /api/gm/tasks - creates broadcast task
Backend: POST /api/gm/tasks - rejects invalid action (400)
Backend: PATCH /api/gm/tasks/{task_id} - updates task (enable/disable)
Backend: POST /api/gm/tasks/{task_id}/run-now - queues task for immediate run
Backend: DELETE /api/gm/tasks/{task_id} - deletes task
Backend: GET /api/gm/tasks - requires admin (403 for non-admin)
Backend: GET /api/gm/broadcasts - lists broadcast history
Backend: POST /api/gm/broadcast - sends broadcast via RCON
Backend: POST /api/gm/broadcast - rejects empty message (400)
Backend: Broadcast endpoints require admin (403 for non-admin)
Backend: GET /api/gm/players - lists tracked players
Backend: GET /api/gm/players/{player_name} - returns player profile with notes, actions, sessions
Backend: POST /api/gm/players/note - adds player note
Backend: POST /api/gm/players/note - adds watchlist note
Backend: POST /api/gm/players/action - executes warn action
Backend: GET /api/gm/players/banned - lists banned players
Backend: GET /api/gm/players/watchlist - lists watchlist notes
Backend: Player admin endpoints require admin (403 for non-admin)
Backend: GET /api/gm/triggers - lists event triggers
Backend: POST /api/gm/triggers - creates trigger
Backend: PATCH /api/gm/triggers/{trigger_id} - toggles trigger
Backend: DELETE /api/gm/triggers/{trigger_id} - deletes trigger
Backend: Trigger endpoints require admin (403 for non-admin)
Backend: GET /api/gm/quick-commands - lists saved commands
Backend: POST /api/gm/quick-commands - saves command
Backend: POST /api/gm/quick-commands/{cmd_id}/execute - executes command
Backend: DELETE /api/gm/quick-commands/{cmd_id} - deletes command
Backend: POST /api/gm/quick-commands/{cmd_id}/execute - returns 404 for nonexistent
Backend: Quick command endpoints require admin (403 for non-admin)
Backend: GET /api/gm/log - returns action log with timestamps and actors
Backend: GET /api/gm/log?limit=10 - respects limit parameter
Backend: Action log requires admin (403 for non-admin)
Frontend: Login with Commander / DS-NV3F-CQ4Q-STFP-CVGN works
Frontend: Dashboard shows 7 tabs for admin (Overview, Console, Tactical Map, Players, Factions, Game Master, Admin)
Frontend: Game Master tab visible only for admin users
Frontend: GM panel has 7 sub-tabs (GM Overview, Scheduler, Broadcasts, Player Admin, Triggers, Quick Cmds, Action Log)
Frontend: GM Overview shows 6 stat cards with correct counts
Frontend: Scheduler panel shows existing tasks with play/pause/delete controls
Frontend: Scheduler panel has New Task button and create form
Frontend: Triggers panel shows Welcome Message trigger
Frontend: Triggers panel has New Trigger button
Frontend: Player Admin has action form (player name, action type, reason)
Frontend: Player Admin has note form (player name, note type, content)
Frontend: Player Admin shows tracked players list and ban list
Frontend: Broadcasts panel has message input and quick message buttons
Frontend: Broadcasts panel shows broadcast history
Frontend: Quick Commands panel has command input and save button
Frontend: Quick Commands panel shows saved commands with execute/delete buttons
Frontend: Action Log shows entries with timestamps, actors, and action details
Frontend: Non-admin user (TestPlayer2) cannot see Game Master tab
Frontend: Non-admin user (TestPlayer2) cannot see Admin tab

bugs_fixed.issue: Route ordering bug - /api/gm/players/banned and /api/gm/players/watchlist were being matched by /api/gm/players/{player_name}
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved specific routes (/players/banned, /players/watchlist) BEFORE the parameterized route (/players/{player_name})

bugs_fixed.issue: NameError in delete_trigger - 'user' variable not defined
bugs_fixed.fix: Added 'user = await require_admin(request)' to capture user for logging

context_for_next_testing_agent: Game Master system fully tested. All 7 GM sub-tabs working: GM Overview (6 stat cards), Scheduler (task CRUD with play/pause/delete), Broadcasts (send via RCON + history), Player Admin (action form + note form + tracked/banned lists), Triggers (event-based automation), Quick Commands (saved RCON commands), Action Log (audit trail). Non-admin users correctly blocked from GM endpoints (403) and GM tab hidden in UI. Two bugs were fixed: route ordering for /players/banned and /players/watchlist, and missing user variable in delete_trigger.
